title: Lorong Warna Tak Terduga
theme: Menemukan kebahagiaan tak terduga dan inspirasi baru melalui sebuah petualangan kecil di sudut kota yang terabaikan.

cover.prompt: A cinematic photograph capturing a laptop screen, emitting a cool blue glow. A single, distinct cursor blinks gently on a clear, digital canvas. The composition features a shallow depth of field, subtly blurring the background into a soft focus, revealing a quiet, comfortable interior space bathed in warm, gentle lighting. The overall mood is one of contemplative stillness and the quiet potential of a new beginning, subtly contrasting the laptop's hue with the inviting room ambiance. Rule of thirds composition, focusing on the screen and the atmospheric lighting.
cover.style: Cinematic photography, shallow depth of field, warm color grading

meta.plan_summary: Kania, a graphic designer battling creative block, seeks inspiration by exploring her city. She discovers a hidden, seemingly dilapidated alley that reveals a vibrant art display of murals depicting local history and community aspirations, leading to a secret mini city park. This unexpected journey reignites her creative spirit and changes her perspective on urban beauty.
